records.content_snippet:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8"?>
<odoo>

    <!-- İade Wizard Form View -->
    <record id="sanal_pos_refund_wizard_form" model="ir.ui.view">
        <field name="name">sanal.pos.refund.wizard.form</field>
        <field name="model">sanal.pos.refund.wizard</field>
        <field name="arch" type="xml">
            <form>
                <group>
                    <group>
                        <field name="transaction_id"/>
                        <field name="original_amount"/>
                        <field name="already_refunded"/>
                        <field name="max_refund_amount"/>
                    </group>
                    <group>
                        <field name="refund_type"/>
                        <field name="refund_amount"
                               invisible="refund_type == 'full'"/>
                    </group>
                </group>
                <group>
                    <field name="reason" placeholder="İade nedenini yazın..."/>
                </group>
                <footer>
                    <button name="action_refund" type="object"
                            string="İade Yap" class="btn-primary"/>
                    <button string="İptal" class="btn-secondary" special="cancel"/>
                </footer>
            </form>
        </field>
    </record>

    <!-- İade Wizard Action -->
    <record id="action_sanal_pos_refund_wizard" model="ir.actions.act_window">
        <field name="name">Sanal POS İade</field>
        <field name="res_model">sanal.pos.refund.wizard</field>
        <field name="view_mode">form</field>
        <field name="target">new</field>
    </record>

</odoo>
